chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 67 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1. For orders on MA No.733/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.734/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of protective bail 15.08.2023 Mr. Ali Akbar Narejo, Advocate for applicants/accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. Through this bail application, applicants/accused Akbar son of Shahnawaz Narejo and Nasrullah son of Amanullah Narejo seek protective bail in Crime No.51 of 2021 of Police Station F.M. Narejo, District Khairpur, registered for offences under Sections 302, 337-H, 148, 149, P.P.C. and Section 7 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997. Learned Counsel for the applicants/accused contends that the applicants are innocent, but they have been falsely implicated by the complainant on account of murderous enmity. He further contends that the applicants/accused are ready to appear before the Court concerned along with an application under Section 498, Cr.P.C. to prove their innocence, however, they apprehend their immediate arrest as non- bailable warrants have been issued against them; hence, they seek protective bail. Without touching merits and de-merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 15.08.2023 to 21.08.2023 (both days inclusive) is granted to the applicants/accused subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court.

He further contends that the applicants/accused are ready to appear before the Court concerned along with an application under Section 498, Cr.P.C. to prove their innocence, however, they apprehend their immediate arrest as non- bailable warrants have been issued against them; hence, they seek protective bail. Without touching merits and de-merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 15.08.2023 to 21.08.2023 (both days inclusive) is granted to the applicants/accused subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of non-bailable warrants in this case shall remain Cr. Bail App. No. D – 67 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 suspended during aforesaid period of seven days. Applicants/ accused are directed to surrender before the Court concerned in the aforementioned period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above seven days period or whenever the applicants/ accused surrender before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case the applicants/accused fail to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
